metaTitle: About Lincoln Egress Windows | Egress Window Experts in Lincoln & Southeast Nebraska
metaDescription: Lincoln Egress Windows installs and replaces code-compliant egress windows and window wells across Lincoln, NE and the surrounding counties. Licensed, insured, free written estimates.
heroSub: We cut, install, and replace egress windows and window wells for homeowners across Lincoln and Southeast Nebraska, and we handle the permits and inspections that come with it.
storyHtml:
Lincoln Egress Windows focuses on one job and does it right: cutting code-compliant egress windows into foundation walls and building the window wells that go with them. That focus means every crew on site has done this specific work before, on the same kind of poured concrete and block foundations found across Lincoln and Lancaster County.

A lot of basement finishing projects and home sales get held up over an egress window that was never sized or permitted correctly. We built our process around avoiding that: sizing the opening to meet IRC egress code with margin, pulling the required permits, and scheduling the inspections that make the work official rather than just finished-looking. You get a written estimate before anything is cut, and a job that passes inspection the first time.

We work on homes throughout Lincoln and out into Waverly, Hickman, Seward, Crete, Beatrice, and Ashland, which covers Lancaster, Seward, Saline, and Gage counties. Whether it's a full egress window installation, an egress window replacement, or just a window well that needs rebuilding, it's the same crew and the same standard.

We're licensed and insured, and we keep a line open 24/7 for the situations that can't wait, a window well that's failing before a closing date, or a code inspection deadline coming up fast. For everything else, call us at (402) 875-2214 or email info@lincolnegresswindows.com and we'll set up a time to come look at your foundation.

values.title: Code Compliance First
values.desc: Every window we install is sized to meet IRC egress requirements with margin, not right at the minimum, so it holds up to inspection and to a future home sale.

values.title: Permits and Inspections Handled
values.desc: We pull the building permit under our license and schedule the required inspections, so you're not the one tracking down the city.

values.title: Free Written Estimates
values.desc: We look at the actual foundation and site before giving a number, and you get it in writing, not a guess over the phone.

values.title: Licensed, Insured, and Local
values.desc: We work foundations across Lincoln and Southeast Nebraska and keep a 24/7 line open for inspections and closing deadlines that can't wait.

faq.q: What areas does Lincoln Egress Windows serve?
faq.a: We serve Lincoln, NE and Southeast Nebraska, including Lancaster, Seward, Saline, and Gage counties. That covers Waverly, Hickman, Seward, Crete, Beatrice, and Ashland along with Lincoln itself.

faq.q: Is Lincoln Egress Windows licensed and insured?
faq.a: Yes. We're licensed and insured for foundation cutting and egress window installation work, and we pull the required building permits under our license for every cut-in.

Yes. We give a free written estimate after seeing your foundation and site in person, since cost depends on foundation type, depth, and access. Call (402) 875-2214 or email info@lincolnegresswindows.com to set up a time.
